patches.name: Ultrawide Aspect Ratio (Camera Structs)
patches.description: All five code-immediate AR writes to camera struct fields +0x408 and +0x428. All five required for gameplay ultrawide.

sites.notes: D — mov [rbx+0x428], 1.7778f at 0x03FA3212. Required for gameplay UW (dropping this reverts gameplay to 16:9).

patches.name: Ultrawide Aspect Ratio (Viewport)
patches.description: Shadow-constant redirect for the pillarbox float at 0x065675C8. Shadow slot at foff=0x065675DC receives the UW AR. Site 6 (0x065675C8) itself is NOT patched — callers 1-7 must keep reading 1.7777. Only caller 8 (movss xmm7 at foff=0x0411462B, the second-renderer viewport path) is redirected to the shadow. This is the sole caller that drives gameplay ultrawide without stretching the UI.

sites.notes: rdata float at 0x05D490C0 — drives splash/boot renderer.
Shadow slot at foff=0x065675DC (VA 0x1465687DC). Free zero slot +0x14 from site6. Only caller 8 redirects here.
Redirect caller 8 (movss xmm7) at foff=0x0411462B → shadow
